They reactivated the YouSavedMorimens code if you haven't entered it yet. I think thats 100 standard pulls.

You seem like you have aequor standard pretty much set. I would pull on another banner probably. Maybe ultra? Could maybe consider pulling caro a little if you want to eventually try agrippa + castor in dtide if you actually enjoy turn 15+ stall gaming.
haha idk what this means but I wwill go with ultra
I didnt play for too long the first time around
So, still new.
castor is very good but very boring/slow

No worries. You seem like you have a fair variety of limiteds so when you get to dtide (endgame) you should have a fair amount of choices in teams to build. 

Current limited banners are a bit hit or miss. Tulu and wanda are not very strong. Salvador is ok. Kathigura is strong but only at e3 and very weak before that. Half anni is coming up very soon so unless kath appeals to you it might make sense to save for that. Will likely get more banner variety then.
Awesome, do we know anything on the anni? I will save for that.
best card for Gdoll e1, Caecus e4, and Hameln e2. I have Blade e3 on my tawil e1 ?

Next big banner is arachne who will be ultra. We don't know what her kit looks like. Last half anni had a "build your own banner" thing where you could select a character and wheel you wanted. Lot of people did thais. Last anni had a banner that swapped between arc 2 characters each day. We don't know ahead of time exactly what they are going to do but some kind of "special" banner would be likely.
Great ty for the info

These are the raw numbers values of
Somatic - HP stat
Esoteric - str,shield,healing stats
Occult - fixed dmg stats
Before modifiers

thanks
For practical purposes yes
But there’s some weirdos out there who like to do theory I.e. calculations and I think they prefer the longer explanations

yes 
I figure people want to  figure out how to make the numbers bigger

More so, “why is this X number”
From there you can do a lot more than just make the number bigger, but I’m merely a simple casual and therefore my eyes glaze over when theory is being discussed

Which should I pick. I believe I chose Yakutsk last time.
sunfall is a good generic dps wheel that is generally outdone by a variety of options
it's good if you have few wheels and don't plan to spend more
birth of a soul is a bit more niche and primarily useful in endgame, but it's completely unique in its niche and hands down one of the strongest wheels in the game for later endgame
I plan on having a Kath team in the future. I just lack the required units.
it's good if you plan to play longterm and intend on doing high difficulty/endgame content, but you might not see much use out of it before then
